title: [LowerSeqToSV] Initialize register element individually
body:
This commit changes initialization of array/struct registers. Previously an aggregate register was initialized with a single concat op with bitcast. Verilator creates a large number of local variables in verilated code, which caused stack-overflow while simulation execution.


For example, 
```
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input a: UInt<32>[2]
    input clock: Clock
    output b: UInt<32>[2]
    reg r : UInt<32>[2], clock
    r <= a
    b <= r
```

`$ firtool tmp.fir -preserve-aggregate=1d-vec -preserve-public-types=false`

before:
```verilog
        _RANDOM_0 = `RANDOM;
        _RANDOM_1 = `RANDOM;
        r = /*cast(bit[1:0][31:0])*/{_RANDOM_0, _RANDOM_1};
```
after:
```verilog
        _RANDOM_0 = `RANDOM;
        _RANDOM_1 = `RANDOM;
        r[1'h0] = _RANDOM_0;
        r[1'h1] = _RANDOM_1;
```
